expectations.text: A new test is added to the existing IntegerStrategyTests.cs file, not a new file
expectations.evidence: Output file is the full IntegerStrategyTests.cs with the new test appended at line 77-81. Transcript confirms 'added to existing file'.

expectations.text: The test method name follows the MethodName_Condition_ExpectedResult convention
The test uses Assert.Throws<ArgumentOutOfRangeException> or equivalent xUnit pattern
The test calls Gen.Integers<int> with min > max
expectations.evidence: Gen.Integers<int>(10, 5) — min=10, max=5, so min > max.

expectations.text: The report states whether the build/test run is red (failing)
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 5: 'RED PHASE CONFIRMED' with specific output showing 1 test failed.
